query:
SELECT 
  o.name as org_name,
  o.id as org_id,
  COUNT(*) as total_responses,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ir.questionId) as unique_questions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ir.response IS NOT NULL AND ir.response != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_responses,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ir.response IS NOT NULL AND ir.response != '' THEN ir.questionId END) as unique_completed
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN intakeResponses ir ON o.id = ir.organizationId
WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson'
GROUP BY o.id;
